name: MCAI36
tagline: Industrial Edge Computing Mini PC with Intel Core i7
description: The MCAI36 is a rugged industrial mini PC powered by Intel Core i7-1260P processor. Built for edge computing, machine vision, and industrial IoT applications with fanless design and wide temperature operation.

features.title: Fanless Design
features.description: Silent operation with zero dust ingress

applications.title: Machine Vision
applications.description: High-speed image processing for quality control

applications.title: Industrial IoT Gateway
applications.description: Connect sensors and devices at the edge
